title: MacVG Version 2.13 November Update
description: This update on MacVG is a fairly small ajustment update, as we only applied some slight improvements and fixed some bugs. We also removed some things, so let's see what we did:

mainarticles.p1: As we've already finished releasing all the major features we wanted to add to MacVG, we'll be adding a lot more games every update, starting from this update! We're introducing 41 brand new games across multiple genres and maybe you'll be able to find your new favorite game here! Go to the New tab to check them out 🎮!
mainarticles.p2: Just like the new update schedule we're applying to other MacWeb apps, MacVG is also getting a new update schedule. From this update forward, MacVG is going to get an update every 3 months. This means we'll release a new update for MacVG each quarter of the year. Specifically, February, May, August, and November. Each update will be named after the season (Spring Update, Fall Update, etc). We made this change so the schedule is more consitent and regular and we have more time to develop exciting new features 📅!
mainarticles.p3: Since we applied a new redesign to MacVG recently, the navigation bar can't fit that many tabs and we want to keep your experience on MacVG fresh and useful. That's why, with a heavy heart, we've decided to remove the Groups tab because it had no practical usage and no one used it/benefited from it. Other than that, we also removed a couple of bugged games that weren't playable at all. In addition to these, we also fixed some games for you to enjoy, fixed navigation links not working, fixed the Recent tab not showing any games, and updated the Originals tab with new content 🔨.

others.other3: Applied redesign styling to Sort & Filter buttons.
